text.title: Async Standup Methodology Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Async Standup Methodology.

example.scenario: Solo founder + 2 contractors in UA/PT/PL timezones. Channel #daily-standup, post-by 11:00 local; Friday weekly rollup. Week 3: 4 blockers identified (2 waiting-on-design, 1 unclear-spec, 1 capacity); top cause = waiting-on-design; founder hires async designer.
